problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
